title: Claude Cowork Projects
summary: Anthropic shipped Projects for Claude Cowork on Mar 20—basically turns your agent work from one-off sessions into persistent workspaces tied to folders & recurring tasks. No more losing context between sessions.
takeaway: Local AI agent workspace that actually remembers what you're working on

title: Perplexity Health
summary: Launched Mar 19 connecting Apple Health, EHRs from 1.7M providers & wearables to give you personalized health answers grounded in your actual data, not generic web results. Rolling out US-only to Pro/Max first.
takeaway: Your scattered health data finally makes sense with AI that actually knows your medical history

title: Windsurf IDE
summary: Arena Mode lets you compare models side-by-side while coding, Plan Mode adds smarter task planning, & parallel multi-agent sessions mean you can run 5 projects at once without context bleeding everywhere.
takeaway: The agentic code editor that actually feels like working with an AI teammate
